deals.title: Europe’s biggest free open-air festival is back in Vienna
deals.description: Europe’s biggest free open-air festival is back in Vienna. 🎶 From July 3–5, 2026, the Donauinselfest turns the Danube Island into a 4.5 km long festival area — completely free to enter. What to expect: 3 days of festival feeling 14 stages around 200 acts over 700 hours of programme music, comedy, action, sports, family activities, food, design market & more The programme starts around midday and continues into the night, with some activities already beginning earlier on Friday.
